decisions: Remove /voicings and /music-fonts entirely, including route-local implementations.
Keep Canvas and Songs directly visible on mobile instead of hiding two links behind a menu.
risks: The compact one-row mobile header must be verified at 390px for touch targets and overflow.

refinement_notes.note: Computed browser styles showed the redesigned header inheriting system ui-sans instead of the approved Geist variable; apply the existing Geist Sans variable to AppNav and re-verify.

history.event: Planner separated route removal, responsive GNB redesign, and browser-backed verification.
Design Agent specified a one-row 64px product header with direct Canvas and Songs links, 44px targets, and a non-pill active indicator after reviewing desktop and mobile evidence.
Builder removed Voicings and Music Fonts route-local files and replaced the pill GNB with the approved responsive semantic-link header.

Refinement requested for builder: Computed browser styles showed the redesigned header inheriting system ui-sans instead of the approved Geist variable; apply the existing Geist Sans variable to AppNav and re-verify.
Builder applied the existing Geist Sans variable to AppNav without changing the approved layout or interaction model.
Verifier passed lint, build, route-manifest, source, desktop, mobile, active-state, target-size, focus, Geist, and removed-route checks after one refinement.
Design Critic approved the one-row GNB against before/after evidence and the product-craft-workbench rubric.
Code Critic approved the route deletions and focused AppNav implementation with no correctness or maintainability findings.
